mapper.sql: id, run_id, provider, product_code, product_name, product_detail, commodity_code, billing_item_code, billing_item, billing_type, subscription_type, currency, stable_day_pretax_amount, period_pretax_amount, instance_count, region_count, sample_instance_id, sample_region, sample_usage, sample_usage_unit, decision, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM billing_audit_item ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT FROM billing_audit_item WHERE run_id = #{runId} ORDER BY period_pretax_amount DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO billing_audit_item ( run_id, provider, product_code, product_name, product_detail, commodity_code, billing_item_code, billing_item, billing_type, subscription_type, currency, stable_day_pretax_amount, period_pretax_amount, instance_count, region_count, sample_instance_id, sample_region, sample_usage, sample_usage_unit, decision ) VALUES ( #{runId}, #{provider}, #{productCode}, #{productName}, #{productDetail}, #{commodityCode}, #{billingItemCode}, #{billingItem}, #{billingType}, #{subscriptionType}, #{currency}, #{stableDayPretaxAmount}, #{periodPretaxAmount}, #{instanceCount}, #{regionCount}, #{sampleInstanceId}, #{sampleRegion}, #{sampleUsage}, #{sampleUsageUnit}, #{decision} )
mapper.update: UPDATE billing_audit_item SET run_id = #{runId}, provider = #{provider}, product_code = #{productCode}, product_name = #{productName}, product_detail = #{productDetail}, commodity_code = #{commodityCode}, billing_item_code = #{billingItemCode}, billing_item = #{billingItem}, billing_type = #{billingType}, subscription_type = #{subscriptionType}, currency = #{currency}, stable_day_pretax_amount = #{stableDayPretaxAmount}, period_pretax_amount = #{periodPretaxAmount}, instance_count = #{instanceCount}, region_count = #{regionCount}, sample_instance_id = #{sampleInstanceId}, sample_region = #{sampleRegion}, sample_usage = #{sampleUsage}, sample_usage_unit = #{sampleUsageUnit}, decision = #{decision} WHERE id = #{id}
